# Nike Training Club · Fitness

Generated: Jul 21, 2026, 7:09 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      4 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 6, 2026 - Jun 28, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Daisy McCoy_, May 21, 2026, 1/5: "I can't even get past the sign in page 😭 the app glitches everytime I sign in just takes me right back to the sign in page..."
            2. _Shola Olabode_, Jun 28, 2026, 2/5: "3 years on, this app still has serious bugs, you will certainly lose part of your activity history at some point, it is a recurring issue. On occasion, the exercises wouldn't load into the app, good exercises, poor usability. (3yrs ago) has some serious bugs, the messages inbox quit working, says "no messages yet' even when the status says otherwise, the refresh on activity achievements tabs doesn't work properly, achievements do not fully clear from screen until you restart the app."
            3. _Aarushi Tripathi_, May 16, 2026, 2/5: "New edit-it's 2026 and the problem of losing history and thus broken progress persists.Very disappointing Old-the removal of the plans has really affected my routine.Nike please fix this. The workouts/instructions are amazing but some improvements required in the interface-a slight touch by mistake can skip exercises making it difficult to restart, and an unintentional swipe can remove a workout from history that is impossible to retrieve.I've lost 1-2 this way and couldn't undo it"

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      3 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: May 21, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Travis Hartley_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "Unable to log in even after setting up. Attempt to Sign in, taken the webpage the get OTP, taken back to sign in screen. This then continues to happen. Can't rate the actual app as cannot see it."
            2. _Osa Osazuwa_, Jul 12, 2026, 1/5: "I can't access my account....smh"
            3. _Daisy McCoy_, May 21, 2026, 1/5: "I can't even get past the sign in page 😭 the app glitches everytime I sign in just takes me right back to the sign in page..."
